name: Get Deleted Coatings Leads for Mad City

content.query:
SELECT
in1.[Division]
,in1.[InboundQueueLogID]
,in1.[LP_LeadID]
,ikr.[LP_InboundKillReasonID]
,ikr.InboundKillReason
,srs.[LP_LeadSubSourceID]
,srs.[LeadSubSource]
,in1.[LP_BranchID]
,in1.[FirstName]
,in1.[LastName]
,in1.[Address1]
,in1.[Address2]
,in1.[City]
,in1.[State]
,in1.[Zip]
,in1.[Phone]
,in1.[Email]
,in1.[ProductID]
,in1.[ProductDescription]
,in1.[Sender]
,in1.[DateReceived]
,in1.[Source]
,in1.[Notes]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[FACT_INBOUND_QUEUE_LOG] in1
 left join EDW.DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE srs 
 on in1.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
 left join EDW.DIM_INBOUND_KILL_REASON ikr
 on in1.InboundKillReasonID = ikr.InboundKillReasonID
 left join [EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
 on in1.LeadID = lds.LeadID
 where 
 in1.Division = 'MAC'
 and in1.ProductID = 'Coat'
 and lds.LeadID is null
 and Email not like '%xivic%'
 and Email not like '%test.com%'
